heading: Our Wheelchair Taxi Services in Bangalore
subheading: Reliable, dignified, and fully accessible transportation for every journey across Bengaluru.

services.title: Airport Transfers
services.description: Door-to-door wheelchair accessible transport to and from Kempegowda International Airport (BIAL). Our drivers know the best routes and handle all accessibility needs at the terminal.
highlights: Pickup & drop at Terminal 1 and Terminal 2
Pre-book up to 7 days in advance

services.title: Hospital Transport
services.description: Specialized transport for hospital visits, dialysis appointments, physiotherapy sessions, and post-surgery discharges across all major Bengaluru hospitals.

services.title: Outstation Trips
services.description: Wheelchair accessible outstation travel from Bengaluru to Mysuru, Coorg, Ooty, and other popular destinations. Comfortable long-distance journeys with rest stops.
highlights: Bengaluru to Mysuru, Coorg, Ooty & more

services.title: Package Trips & Events
services.description: Full-day or multi-day packages for weddings, family events, sightseeing tours, and corporate needs. Customised itineraries for wheelchair users.

uspSection.heading: Bangalore's Only Automatic Hydraulic Lift Taxi
uspSection.description: Every competitor in Bengaluru uses manual foldable ramps that require physical lifting and create safety risks. Our automatic hydraulic lift changes everything — zero physical strain, zero risk, maximum dignity.
benefits: 300kg capacity hydraulic platform — handles all wheelchair types
One-button operation — no manual lifting by anyone
4-point wheelchair locking system inside the cabin
Ground-level boarding — no steep ramp inclines
Certified safety mechanisms with auto-stop sensors

cta.heading: Ready to experience the difference?
cta.subheading: Book your first ride and see why families across Bengaluru trust YuvanCabs.
